affected_agents: Claude crawlers reportedly blocked; non-partner crawlers restricted
evidence_summary: Reddit restricts crawlers without commercial agreements; robots also restricts many URL patterns including comments, APIs, search and JSON.
recommended_workaround: Paste thread text, use screenshots/export, or use official Reddit/API-permitted source.
notes: Direct Claude-User robots block not visible in robots.txt; access failures are usually policy/API/bot-control related.

evidence_summary: x.com robots.txt allows selected bots like Googlebot/Bingbot but has User-agent: * Disallow: / for other bots.
recommended_workaround: Paste post/thread text; use screenshots; use public article mirrors when available.
notes: Even when a post is public, comments, media, and replies are often inaccessible.

evidence_summary: LinkedIn states automated access without express permission is strictly prohibited and only approved public search crawlers may be permitted.
recommended_workaround: Paste post/profile text or use screenshots; rely on user-provided exports.
notes: Claude cannot act as your logged-in LinkedIn browser.

evidence_summary: Public previews may appear but most profile/post/comment access collapses into login/app flows or dynamic content.
recommended_workaround: Paste caption/comments, screenshots, or public embeds.
notes: Direct robots retrieval returned an internal fetch error during check.

evidence_summary: Most posts/groups/comments require an authenticated session and cannot be fetched like a public web page.
recommended_workaround: Paste content or screenshots; use public page exports where allowed.
notes: Robots retrieval was not useful in the web fetch output.

evidence_summary: Video pages often require JS/app flows and bot checks; comments/transcripts are especially unreliable.
recommended_workaround: Paste transcript/caption/comments or use screenshots.
notes: Robots retrieval was not useful in the web fetch output.

evidence_summary: Some pages are public, but answers often trigger login/signup walls or anti-scraping patterns.
recommended_workaround: Paste the question/answer text directly.
notes: Access varies by page and region.

evidence_summary: Most Discord content is server/channel-gated and unavailable without an authenticated account or connector.
recommended_workaround: Export messages, paste content, or use a permitted connector/API.
notes: Public invite pages are not equivalent to message access.

evidence_summary: Slack messages/files require workspace authentication and permissions.
recommended_workaround: Use a connector/export or paste relevant messages.
notes: Not a normal public-web target.

evidence_summary: Private docs and Drive files require account permissions; even public docs may render via JS and not expose full content cleanly.
recommended_workaround: Upload/export as PDF/DOCX/TXT or make a public readable copy.
notes: User-owned files should usually be uploaded rather than fetched.

evidence_summary: Private Notion workspaces require authentication; public pages are mixed due to JS rendering.
recommended_workaround: Export Markdown/PDF or share a public static page.
notes: Useful for private docs only via export/connector.

evidence_summary: Figma design content usually requires file permission and is not a plain webpage for text fetch.
recommended_workaround: Export frames/screenshots/PDF or provide a share link plus screenshots.
notes: Claude needs exported artifacts to analyze design precisely.

evidence_summary: Public posts often work, but member-only posts and app/paywall surfaces do not.
recommended_workaround: Paste post text or use the author’s canonical blog if available.
notes: Access varies by post.

primary_barrier: Paid posts; email-only posts; dynamic pages
evidence_summary: Free public posts may work; paid subscriber posts and email-only material do not.
recommended_workaround: Paste article text or export email content.
notes: Individual publication domains may have their own robots rules.

evidence_summary: Most creator posts are gated by account and membership status.
recommended_workaround: Paste content you have rights to access.
notes: Public previews are limited.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt explicitly disallows ClaudeBot, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User, Claude-Web and anthropic-ai.
recommended_workaround: Paste article text or use licensed/public excerpts.
notes: Also uses content signals: ai-input=no, ai-train=no for some agents.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt groups ClaudeBot, Claude-SearchBot and Claude-User with Disallow: /.
recommended_workaround: Paste article text or use available excerpts/official RSS where allowed.
notes: Condé Nast pattern also appears on New Yorker.

primary_barrier: Only allowlisted bots permitted; all others blocked
evidence_summary: Reuters allows a long list of specific bots, then blocks all other bots with User-agent: * Disallow: /. Claude agents are not in the visible allowlist.
recommended_workaround: Use article excerpts, licensed sources, or cite other accessible reports.
notes: ChatGPT-User appears allowlisted, but Claude-User does not.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt explicitly disallows ClaudeBot, Claude-Web, Claude-User, Claude-SearchBot and anthropic-ai.
recommended_workaround: Use short excerpts or alternative accessible syndication pages.
notes: Strong evidence.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt states LLM/AI uses are not permitted and disallows ClaudeBot, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-User and anthropic-ai.
recommended_workaround: Paste article text or use public RSS/excerpts within rights limits.
notes: The site also publishes a license URL in robots.txt.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt groups ClaudeBot, Claude-SearchBot and Claude-User with Disallow: /.
recommended_workaround: Paste article text or use article excerpts.
notes: Condé Nast pattern.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt disallows Claude-User, Claude-SearchBot, Claude-Web, ClaudeBot and anthropic-ai except /sp/.
recommended_workaround: Paste article text or use accessible article snippets.
notes: Important because tech/news topics often cite The Verge.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt/search snippets indicate Anthropic/Claude crawler disallow; subscription paywall is an additional barrier.

evidence_summary: Bloomberg pages often require subscription and are heavily dynamic/bot-protected; direct robots fetch was not useful in this run.

evidence_summary: Robots fetch returned 503 in this run; product pages often have anti-bot and dynamic price/availability.
recommended_workaround: Use a shopping/search tool or paste product details; verify prices manually.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt blocks search, APIs, account/cart/order paths; product pages may still vary by region/session.

notes: Not confirmed Claude-specific inaccessible.

evidence_summary: Robots.txt blocks cart/account/search/shop and many commerce paths.

primary_barrier: APIs, cart, availability, pricing paths blocked

evidence_summary: eBay robots.txt states automated access without express permission is prohibited; checkout/LLM-driven buy flows are prohibited.
recommended_workaround: Use manual browsing; paste listing details.
notes: Search and listings may be partly indexable; actions/checkouts are not.

evidence_summary: Robots retrieval did not surface usable content in this run; product pages are dynamic and region/session sensitive.
recommended_workaround: Manual price/stock verification; paste product details.
notes: Needs fresh verification.

evidence_summary: Robots request returned a Site Maintenance HTML response in this run rather than usable robots rules.
recommended_workaround: Manual verification; paste product details.
notes: Mobile-app-heavy retail flows are poor crawl targets.

evidence_summary: Retail page access usually varies by session, region and anti-bot checks; not verified in this run.

evidence_summary: Catalog/playback data requires account/session; robots output was not useful in this run.
recommended_workaround: Use public title pages or paste title details; verify availability in your account/region.
notes: Regional availability changes.

evidence_summary: Catalog/playback details require account/session; robots output was not useful in this run.
recommended_workaround: Use public title pages or paste details; verify in account/region.

evidence_summary: Robots request returned HTML rather than clean robots rules in this run; playback/catalog is account/region gated.

evidence_summary: Public video pages may be reachable, but captions/comments are inconsistent without dedicated transcript tools or user-provided transcript.
recommended_workaround: Provide transcript, captions, or comments export.
notes: Video metadata differs from transcript availability.

evidence_summary: Live chat/VOD state requires JS/session and is not reliable via simple fetch.
recommended_workaround: Provide VOD transcript/chat export or screenshots.
notes: Public channel pages may fetch but chat does not.

evidence_summary: Public artist/album pages may work, but playback/catalog details can be region/account dependent.
recommended_workaround: Use public links plus manual verification; paste needed metadata.
notes: Not confirmed Claude-specific inaccessible.

evidence_summary: Pinterest commonly requires login and heavily renders via JS grids.
recommended_workaround: Use screenshots/exported images or paste pin text.
notes: Visual content requires image inputs rather than web text.

evidence_summary: Search result pages are dynamic, personalized and bot-restricted; tools should use search APIs instead.
recommended_workaround: Ask for a web search through the assistant rather than providing a Google SERP URL.
notes: SERP snapshots are not stable sources.

evidence_summary: Private repositories require authenticated access; public GitHub usually works well.
recommended_workaround: Use a connector, make repo public, or upload relevant files.
notes: Public raw files are generally better than rendered pages.

evidence_summary: Private issues, PRs and discussions require authenticated org/repo permissions.
recommended_workaround: Use connector/export or paste issue/PR text.
notes: Public issues generally work.

evidence_summary: Public Notion pages can render through JS and may not expose full block content to simple fetch.
recommended_workaround: Export Markdown/PDF; use a static public page if possible.
notes: Private pages are auth-gated.

evidence_summary: Maps listings/reviews are dynamic, region/personalization-heavy and not appropriate as simple page fetches.
recommended_workaround: Use the assistant’s local/search tools or provide specific place links/details.
notes: Local data changes often.

evidence_summary: IMDb pages may be public but can be dynamic and bot-protected; not verified in this run.
recommended_workaround: Use public data snippets or paste details.
notes: Needs fresh verification.

evidence_summary: Reviews/lists often require login/session and dynamic rendering; not verified in this run.
recommended_workaround: Paste reviews/list text or use exported data.
notes: Needs fresh verification.

evidence_summary: Private Teams content requires authenticated permissions; public Stack Overflow pages usually work.
recommended_workaround: Use public question URL or paste/export private content.
notes: Public Stack Overflow is usually accessible.

evidence_summary: Papers/profiles often require login or publisher access; PDFs may not be publicly reachable.
recommended_workaround: Use DOI, arXiv, publisher PDF, or upload the paper.
notes: Prefer primary research PDFs.
